calendar.matters:
Petitioner James O'Dorisio, Md'S Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar May-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Firestone of The Law Firm of Marvin Firestone, MD.JD & Associates telephone number 650-212-4900 for and with Petitioner James O'Dorisio MD.
Carolyne Evans and Jane Simon of Office of the Attorney General telephone number 415-703-5544 for Respondent Medical Board of California.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, Petitioner James O'Dorisio, MD'S Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus was taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing And Motion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PETITIONER JAMES O'DORISIO, MD'S Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is continued to April 29, 2016 at 2:00 p.m., in Dept. 302. This motion will be heard by Judge Quinn.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing And Motion For Writ Of Mandate
